name: chromedriver-autoinstaller

metadata.name: chromedriver-autoinstaller
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Automatically install chromedriver that supports the currently installed version of chrome.

documentation:
# chromedriver-autoinstaller
Automatically download and install [chromedriver](https://chromedriver.chromium.org/) that supports the currently installed version of chrome. This installer supports Linux, MacOS and Windows operating systems.

## Installation

```bash
pip install chromedriver-autoinstaller
```

## Usage
Just type `import chromedriver_autoinstaller` in the module you want to use chromedriver.

## Example
```
from selenium import webdriver
import chromedriver_autoinstaller


chromedriver_autoinstaller.install()  # Check if the current version of chromedriver exists
                                      # and if it doesn't exist, download it automatically,
                                      # then add chromedriver to path

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("http://www.python.org")
assert "Python" in driver.title
```

- CHIDA <[iam.yeongbin.jo@gmail.com](mailto:iam.yeongbin.jo@gmail.com)>

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.install
documentation:
Appends the directory of the chromedriver binary file to PATH.

```
param cwd

Flag indicating whether to download to current working directory. If the  is True, then path argument will be ignored.

param path

Specify the path where the Chrome driver will be installed. If the  value is True, this value is ignored.

param no_ssl

Determines whether or not to use the encryption protocol when downloading the chrome driver.

return

The file path of chromedriver
```

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.get_chrome_version
documentation:
Get installed version of chrome on client

```
return

The version of chrome
```

modules.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils
documentation: Helper functions for filename and URL generation.

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_chromedriver_filename
documentation:
Returns the filename of the binary for the current platform.
\:return: Binary filename

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_variable_separator
documentation:
Returns the environment variable separator for the current platform.
\:return: Environment variable separator

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_chromedriver_url
documentation:
Generates the download URL for current platform , architecture and the given version.
Supports Linux, MacOS and Windows.

```
param chromedriver_version

ChromeDriver version string

param no_ssl

Whether to use the encryption protocol when downloading the chrome driver

return

String. Download URL for chromedriver
```

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.find_binary_in_path
documentation:
Searches for a binary named `filename` in the current PATH. If an executable is found, its absolute path is returned
else None.
\:param filename: Filename of the binary
\:return: Absolute path or None

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_chrome_version
documentation:
---
return: the version of chrome installed on client
---

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_linux_executable_path
documentation:
Look through a list of candidates for Google Chrome executables that might
exist, and return the full path to first one that does. Raise a ValueError
if none do.

```
return

the full path to a Chrome executable on the system
```

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_major_version
documentation:
---
param version: the version of chrome
return: the major version of chrome
---

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_matched_chromedriver_version
documentation:
Try to find a specific version of ChromeDriver to match a version of cCrome

```
param chrome_version

the version of Chrome to match against

param no_ssl

get version list using unsecured HTTP get

return

String. The version of chromedriver that matches the Chrome version
None.   if no matching version of chromedriver was discovered
```

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.get_chromedriver_path
documentation:
---
return: path of the chromedriver binary
---

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.print_chromedriver_path
documentation: Print the path of the chromedriver binary.

functions.name: chromedriver_autoinstaller.utils.download_chromedriver
documentation:
Downloads, unzips and installs chromedriver.
If a chromedriver binary is found in PATH it will be copied, otherwise downloaded.

```
param str path

Path of the directory where to save the downloaded chromedriver to.

param bool no_ssl

Determines whether or not to use the encryption protocol when downloading the chrome driver.

return

The file path of chromedriver
```
